{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Power Infobox|Strength|2}}
{{BD|Strength||2}} is a {{2|Buffs|Buff}} that increases the damage of {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack cards}} and  enemy Attacks.

Each point of {{BD|Strength||2}} increases the damage of an attack by 1. Attacks that hit multiple times, like {{C|Sword Boomerang||2}}, will apply {{BD|Strength||2}} to each individual hit.

{{BD|Strength||2}} can be negative, reducing the damage of attacks to a minimum of 0 damage per hit.

== Sources ==
==== Cards ====
* {{C|Setup Strike||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Dominate||2}}: Gain 1 {{BD|Strength||2}} for each{{BD|Vulnerable||2}} on the enemy.
* {{C|Fight Me!||2}}: Gain 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}}. The enemy gains 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Inflame||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Brand||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Resonance||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Bulk Up||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Coordinate||2}}: Give another player 5(8) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Prowess||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Feeding Frenzy||2}}: 5(7) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.

=== Cards- Buffs===
* {{BD|Rupture||2}}: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{BD|Demon Form||2}}: At the start of your turn, gain 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{BD|Monologue||2}}: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{BD|Arsenal||2}}: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}}.

=== Cards - Strength Down===
* {{C|Mangle||2}}: Enemy loses 10(15) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Piercing Wail||2}}: ALL enemies lose 6(8) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Malaise||2}}: Enemy loses X(+1) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Crush Under||2}}: ALL enemies lose 1(2) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Resonance||2}}: ALL enemies lose 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Dying Star||2}}: ALL enemies lose 9(11) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{BD|Monarch's Gaze||2}}: Whenever you attack an enemy, it loses 1 {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Enfeebling Touch||2}}: ALL enemies lose 8(11) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{C|Friendship||2}}: Lose 2(1) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Shared Fate||2}}: Lose 2 {{BD|Strength||2}}. Enemy loses 2(3) {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{C|Dark Shackles||2}}: Enemy loses 9(15) {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.

==== Relics ====
* {{R|Vajra||2}}: 1 {{BD|Strength||2}} at the start of each combat.
* {{R|Red Skull||2}}: While your HP is at or below 50%, you have 3 additional{{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Reptile Trinket||2}}: Whenever you use a potion, gain 3 {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{R|Sparkling Rouge||2}}: 1 {{BD|Strength||2}} at the end of your 3rd turn.
* {{R|Girya||2}}: You can now gain {{BD|Strength||2}} at Rest Sites. (3 times max)
* {{R|Rainbow Ring||2}}: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Powers each turn, gain 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Shuriken||2}}: Every time you play 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}} in a single turn, gain 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Ruined Helmet||2}}: The first time you gain {{BD|Strength||2}} each combat, double the amount gained.
* {{R|Mini Regent||2}}: The first time you spend {{KW|Stars||2}} each turn, gain 1{{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Toasty Mittens||2}}: At the start of your turn, {{BD|Exhaust||2}} the top card of your Draw Pile and gain 1{{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Philosopher's Stone||2}}: ALL enemies start combat with 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Brimstone||2}}: At the start of your turn, gain 2{{BD|Strength||2}} and ALL enemies gain 1{{BD|Strength||2}}. 
* {{R|Ember Tea||2}}: At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{R|Sword of Jade||2}}: Start each combat with 3 {{BD|Strength||2}}.

==== Potions ====
* {{P|Strength Potion||2}}: 2 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{P|Flex Potion||2}}: 5 {{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{P|Fysh Oil||2}}: 1 {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{P|Shackling Potion||2}}: ALL enemies lose 7{{BD|Strength||2}} this turn.
* {{P|Mazaleth's Gift||2}}: 1 {{BD|Ritual||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* [[Enchantments]] are applied to a card before {{BD|Strength||2}}, including {{BD|Sharp||2}}, {{BD|Vigorous||2}}, {{BD|Momentum||2}}, and even {{BD|Favored||2}}
** {{BD|Favored||2}} is the only multiplicative effect applied before {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* Additive effects like {{BD|Strength||2}} are applied '''before''' multiplicative effects like {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}.
** For example, if you have 2 {{BD|Strength||2}} and play {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike|2}} on a {{BD|Vulnerable||2}} target, you will deal '''12''' damage ((6+2)×1.5) instead of '''11''' damage ((6×1.5)+2).
** Multiplicative effects are {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}, {{BD|Weak||2}}, {{BD|Double Damage||2}}, {{R|Pen Nib||2}}, {{BD|Flutter||2}}, {{BD|Soar||2}}, {{BD|Slow||2}}, and {{BD|Surrounded||2}},.
** {{BD|Vigor||2}}, {{C|Accuracy||2}}, {{R|Strike Dummy||2}} stack additively with {{BD|Strength||2}}.
=== What works with Strength ===
* Only damage from {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack}} cards can benefit from {{BD|Strength||2}}.
** Damage from Buffs or Debuffs are not affected by {{BD|Strength||2}}, such as {{C|Inferno||2}}, {{C|Serpent Form||2}}, {{C|Strangle||2}}, {{C|Black Hole||2}}, or {{C|Smokestack||2}}.
** Direct HP loss is not affected by {{BD|Strength||2}}, such as {{BD|Poison||2}}, {{C|Bloodletting||2}}, {{C|Offering||2}}, {{C|Haunt||2}}, and {{C|Capture Spirit||2}}.
** Damage from Relics is not affected by {{BD|Strength||2}}, including {{R|Festive Popper||2}}, {{R|Letter Opener||2}}, and {{R|Screaming Flagon||2}}.
** Damage from Orbs is not affected by {{BD|Strength||2}}.
* {{BD|Osty||2}} does not consider any Buffs or Debuffs on the player, including {{BD|Strength||2}}, when attacking.
